strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React production work (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Current hands-on AI agent development: MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin absent and Java/Python exposure appears dated or peripheral relative to the multi-language requirement
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly cited, though testing expertise is evident in other ecosystems
response.justification: The role's core competencies are end-to-end TypeScript/Node/React delivery, testing rigor, cloud/container knowledge, and AI agent development. The candidate shows strong evidence on nearly all: years of TypeScript/Node/React product work at Optilyz and RIDE, MongoDB and AWS CDK usage, Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective, Docker-based CI/CD at Altom, and current MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq — a directly relevant and rare match for the AI agent requirement. Testing expertise is exceptional (TDD practice, authored assertion libraries and a test runner, taught Selenium/TDD courses), which offsets the lack of named Vitest/Playwright experience. Gaps are framework-specific rather than skill-specific: Nest.js is unmentioned and Kotlin is absent, with Java exposure dated. Given the depth in the primary stack and AI agent work, these are learnable gaps for a candidate at this level.
